title: Rito
description: A social bookmarking service built on the atproto. It provides a place to bookmark and share anything on the web, simply and with attention to detail.

aboutDetails.intro: Rito is an atproto-based social bookmarking service for saving useful links, adding your own context, and discovering what other people found worth keeping. Use your existing atproto account, including Bluesky accounts, without creating a separate Rito identity.

workflow.title: What you can do with Rito
workflow.description: A bookmark becomes more than a URL. Rito combines the page information with community context so that links remain useful after they leave your timeline.

save.title: Save links from across the web
save.description: Register articles, tools, videos, app pages, and other public URLs. Rito collects available page metadata such as the title, description, and preview image.

organize.title: Add comments and tags
organize.description: Record why a link matters, group related bookmarks with tags, and search them later instead of relying on a social timeline or browser history.

discover.title: Discover links through people
discover.description: The home page brings together recently saved and discussed links. Search and category views help you move from a broad feed to a specific subject.

access.title: Save from your normal browser
access.description: Use the website, Chrome extension, Firefox add-on, or bookmarklet. They all lead to the same Rito bookmarks associated with your atproto account.

categories.title: Why the home page uses automatic categories
categories.description: Shared links arrive with different tags, languages, and levels of detail. Rito classifies them into a small, consistent set of topics so the Discover page stays navigable as the collection grows.
categories.input: Classification considers the page title and description first, then tags and the bookmarker's comment.
categories.result: Each bookmark is assigned one primary topic, such as Technology, Social, Food, Travel, Entertainment, Photo, or atproto. Unclear items fall back to General.
categories.reason: The category is a discovery aid, not a statement about the author or an endorsement of the linked content. Processing happens asynchronously, so a new bookmark may briefly appear as uncategorized.

myApps.title: My Apps: see the atproto services in your repo
myApps.description: An atproto repository contains collections identified by NSIDs. My Apps turns those technical collection names into a visual catalog of services your account has records for.
myApps.collections: After you log in, Rito reads the collection list exposed by your PDS and groups related NSIDs by service.
myApps.catalog: When a matching service bookmark exists, Rito shows its website title, description, image, and tags, making unfamiliar collection names easier to understand.
myApps.boundary: My Apps is an informational catalog. Opening it does not install an app, grant new permissions, or prove that you currently use or endorse every listed service.

data.title: What happens to your data
data.description: Rito writes your bookmark records to your atproto Personal Data Server (PDS). Rito also indexes the information needed to provide public discovery, search, previews, categories, and safety filtering. Bookmarks intended for this social service may therefore be visible to other people; do not use Rito as a private vault for sensitive URLs or notes.

ogp.title: Rito
ogp.description: A social bookmarking platform connecting users and developers.

allbookmark.title: Bookmarks
allbookmark.description: Manage Bluesky and websites together with your Bluesky account
allbookmark.longdescription: You can manage websites with your Bluesky account. Add comments and tags to bookmarks for convenient organization.

atproto.title: Build with atproto
atproto.description: Supports atproto and stores everything in your PDS
atproto.longdescription: Fully compatible with atproto, all data is stored in your PDS.

ownerbenefit.title: Owner Comments
ownerbenefit.description: Owner of atproto-based products can add descriptions to their products
ownerbenefit.longdescription: Product owners can create special bookmarks that display their service description at the top of the bookmark list.

chrome.title: Chrome Extension
chrome.longdescription: You can quickly bookmark to Rito from the extension tab. Tab here for details.

firefox.title: Firefox Add-on
firefox.longdescription: You can quickly bookmark to Rito from the Firefox add-on. Tap here for details.

bookmarklet.title: Bookmarklet
bookmarklet.longdescription: You can quickly bookmark to Rito directly from your bookmarks. Tab here for details.
